diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the continuous cycle of capacity planning from establishing baselines to reviewing and adjusting
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the iterative nature of capacity planning process

diagrams.title: Resource Utilization Zones
diagrams.description: A gauge showing optimal (green), warning (yellow), and critical (red) utilization levels
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing ideal resource utilization ranges for cost-effective operations

diagrams.title: Vertical vs Horizontal Scaling
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of scaling approaches showing vertical (adding to single server) vs horizontal (adding more servers)
elements: Vertical: Single server with more CPU/RAM

diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Flowchart for making capacity decisions based on demand analysis
elements: Analyze Demand → Sufficient Capacity? → Yes (Monitor) / No → Analyze Cost → Provision / Optimize / Scale
